title: Ambush Execution
summary: Setting up and executing surprise attacks on unsuspecting enemies.
details: Successful ambush requires: concealment (sensor shadow, debris field, running silent), patience (wait for optimal moment), violence of action (maximum firepower immediately). Position to cut off escape routes. Strike when enemy is at disadvantage: mid-maneuver, damaged, or distracted. First salvo should cripple if not destroy. If detected before engagement, abort - a failed ambush puts you at disadvantage.
annotations: Ambush trading often favors the ambusher significantly.
Discipline in waiting is the hardest part.
